prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data, financial news, or advanced predictive models necessary to forecast future stock prices. The confidence intervals are illustrative and constructed arbitrarily around the current price to demonstrate the concept of increasing uncertainty with higher confidence levels, not based on any financial analysis or actual volatility data. These values should NOT be used for any financial decisions, as they do not represent a genuine forecast.
